# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

| Version | Supported          |
| ------- | ------------------ |
| 1.x.x   | :white_check_mark: |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability, please report it to us through one of the following methods:

1. Open a security issue in the GitHub repository
2. Email [security@example.com] (replace with actual contact)

We take all security vulnerabilities seriously. Please include the following information:

- Type of issue (e.g., buffer overflow, SQL injection, cross-site scripting)
- Full path of the source file
- Step-by-step instructions to reproduce the issue
- Your suggestion for fixing the vulnerability
- Any additional information that might be helpful

Thank you for helping to keep our project secure!
